etimesSheetala Ashtami 2026 (Basoda 2026): When is it, significance, rituals, timing and how to observe itSheetala Ashtami, also known as Basoda, is a quiet Hindu festival observed a few days after Holi, dedicated to Goddess Sheetala for protection from diseases. Families prepare food a day in advance, eating it cold as a symbol of the goddess's preference for calmness and cooling energy.

etimesWho is Ivanna Ortiz? Florida woman arrested for shootout at Rihanna's LA homeRihanna's Beverly Crest home was targeted by gunfire on March 8, 2026, when a woman fired an AR-15-style rifle from a white Tesla. The LAPD arrested Ivanna Ortiz, 35, from Florida, charging her with attempted murder. Investigators are examining her social media for motives behind the attack.

etimesYouTuber Anurag Dobhal's 150km/h car crash on Delhi-Meerut Expressway: Wife Ritika issues health updateYouTuber Anurag Dobhal, known as UK07 Rider, survived a high-speed car crash on the Delhi-Meerut Expressway during an Instagram live. The incident occurred shortly after he posted a video alleging family harassment and depression. His wife has since confirmed he sustained injuries but is recovering, urging fans to avoid rumors.
